title: View Filters Not Working

posts.author: jcyee (JC Yee)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want the “Misc Tasks” and “Template - Duplicate this” groups to be not visible in this Kanban view, which is just another view in a normal board.

However, after applying the necessary filter to not show them in the Kanban view - these 2 groups are still visible. In fact, there seem to be no changes to the view except for a “Blank” column for what it’s worth.

I already tried refreshing and restarting the browser to no avail.

CleanShot 2024-01-15 at 20.12.09@2x2680×1202 190 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Thanks for sharing! Are you still experiencing this? If so, can you send our support team a message here so we can look into this?

Also, let us know if loading the view in an incognito window did not resolve the issue!

Our team will help you get this sorted out ASAP!
